name: Triton International Ltd
summary: PART I References in this Annual Report on Form 10-K to the Company, Triton, we, us and our refer to Triton International Limited and, where appropriate, its consolidated subsidiaries. Our Company Triton is the world's largest lessor of intermodal containers. Intermodal containers are large, standardized steel boxes used to transport freight by ship, rail or truck. Because of the handling efficiencies they provide, intermodal containers are the primary means by which many goods and materials are...
